name: Supersoaring
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>越</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>翔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 Dinosaur monster that is banished or in either GY; Special Summon it to your field. You can only activate 1 "Supersoaring" per turn.
eff: Target 1 Dinosaur monster that is banished or in either GY; Special Summon it to your field. You can only activate 1 "Supersoaring" per turn.

summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard
